Instant Personal Loan

An instant personal loan is an unsecured financial solution that gives you quick access to funds exactly when you need them. Whether it is for a vacation, a wedding, home renovation, or an unexpected medical expense, you can meet your needs without pledging any collateral. With fixed EMIs over a chosen tenure, repayments are simple, transparent, and easy to plan. Through Home Credit’s fast, easy, and reliable process, you stay in control at every step - from checking your eligible loan amount to selecting a tenure that suits your budget. Our instant personal loans come with flexible EMI options designed to fit your lifestyle.

Enjoy hassle-free applications, quick approvals, and seamless repayments with Home Credit so you can focus on what truly matters. Apply for a personal loan online with Home Credit today.

Personal Loan Eligibility Criteria

To apply for a personal loan with Home Credit, applicants must meet the following criteria:

  • Nationality: Indian
  • Age: Above 21 and up to 60 years.
  • Employment Status: Employed, self-employed, or a pensioner.
  • Bank Account: Active Bank Account

Documents Required for a Personal Loan

The documents required for personal loan from Home Credit include:

Document Type

Acceptable Documents

Identity Proof

PAN Card (Mandatory)

Address Proof

Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, Driving License, Passport, Government House Allotment Letter, Property Tax Receipt (Any one of these)

*Terms and Conditions apply. Home Credit India reserves the rights to call upon additional documents, if required.

Interest Rates & Charges for Personal Loan

You can view the key personal loan fees and charges for Home Credit personal loans below:

Particulars

Details

Processing Fee

Up to 3.9% of the loan amount

APR (Annual Percentage Rate)

21% to 39.5%

Late Payment Charges

Applicable if dues are not paid by the due date (effective 28 March 2024)

Foreclosure Charges

4% of the outstanding principal amount (may be waived with Safe Pay)

Late Payment Charges Breakdown

Charges applicable based on the number of days past the due date.

  • Enter your phone number and download the app

Frequently Asked Questions- Personal Loan

What is a Personal Loan?

A personal loan is an unsecured loan that does not require collateral or a guarantor and can be obtained with just two documents.

Home Credit India offers personal loan of up to ₹4,80,000 to address your present financial requirements. Use it for urgent needs such as medical emergencies, home renovations, weddings, or any unforeseen expenses.
